title: He Who Lives in Hidden Lakes
original_title: He Who Lives in Hidden Lakes
overview: The fanatic beliefs of an internet mystic, a cult leader, and a rookie cop gone rogue are tested on the hunt for the "Hidden Man" -- an elusive forest-dwelling cryptid that terrorizes their idyllic suburb.
